Title: Fusion
Explanation: The object is massive enough to produce themonuclear fusion.

Title: Around a star
Explanation: The object orbits around another star

Title: Around the Sun
Explanation: The object orbits around the sun.

Title: Clean orbit
Explanation: The object has cleaned its orbit from solid objects thought to exist in protoplanetary disks and debris disks, called planetisimals.

Title: Spherical
Explanation: The object is massive enough to be rounded by its own gravity.
